mapper.select: SELECT DEPT_CD, PRNT_DEPT_CD, DEPT_NM, USE_YN, INTL_TEL_NO, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT FROM DEPARTMENT ORDER BY LENGTH(DEPT_CD) ASC, DEPT_CD ASC
SELECT JBGR_CD, JBGR_NM, SORT_ORD, USE_YN, BASE_ANN_LV_DAYS, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT, DEPT_CD FROM JOB_GRADE WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_ORD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER ( USER_ID, USER_ENPSWD, USER_NAME, USER_ENRRNO, USER_GNDR_CD, USER_BRDT, JOIN_DT, USER_TELNO, USER_EMAIL_ADDR, USER_ZIP, USER_ADDR, USER_DADDR, USER_PROFILE, REG_DATE, MOD_DATE, ENABLE, USER_ROLE ) VALUES ( #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userEnpswd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userEnrrno, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userGndrCd, jdbcType=CHAR}, #{userBrdt, jdbcType=DATE}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{userTelno, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userEmailAddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userZip, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userAddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userDaddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userProfile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'Y', #{userRole, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

INSERT INTO EMPLOYEE_SALARY ( USER_ID, BASE_SALARY, APPLY_YMD, USE_YN, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT ) VALUES ( #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{baseSalary, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{applyYmd, jdbcType=DATE}, #{useYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, #{rgtrId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastMdfrId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT m.USER_ID AS M_USER_ID, m.USER_ENPSWD AS M_USER_ENPSWD, m.USER_NAME AS M_USER_NAME, m.USER_ENRRNO AS M_USER_ENRRNO, m.USER_GNDR_CD AS M_USER_GNDR_CD, m.USER_BRDT AS M_USER_BRDT, m.JOIN_DT AS M_JOIN_DT, m.USER_TELNO AS M_USER_TELNO, m.USER_EMAIL_ADDR AS M_USER_EMAIL_ADDR, m.USER_ZIP AS M_USER_ZIP, m.USER_ADDR AS M_USER_ADDR, m.USER_DADDR AS M_USER_DADDR, m.USER_PROFILE AS M_USER_PROFILE, m.REG_DATE AS M_REG_DATE, m.MOD_DATE AS M_MOD_DATE, m.ENABLE AS M_ENABLE, m.USER_ROLE AS M_USER_ROLE, ei.DEPT_CD, ei.EMPL_STAT_CD, ei.EMPL_TYPE_CD, ei.USER_ID AS EI_USER_ID, ei.DEPT_CD AS EI_DEPT_CD, ei.JBGR_CD AS EI_JBGR_CD, ei.JOIN_YMD AS EI_JOIN_YMD, ei.RETMT_YMD AS EI_RETMT_YMD, ei.EMPL_STAT_CD AS EI_EMPL_STAT_CD, ei.ATCH_FILE_ID AS EI_ATCH_FILE_ID, ei.CHRG_DUTY_CN AS EI_CHRG_DUTY_CN, ei.EMPL_TYPE_CD AS EI_EMPL_TYPE_CD, ei.CTRCT_END_YMD AS EI_CTRCT_END_YMD, d.DEPT_NM, j.JBGR_NM, es.BASE_SALARY FROM MEMBER m LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE_INFO ei ON m.USER_ID = ei.USER_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON ei.DEPT_CD = d.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN JOB_GRADE j ON ei.JBGR_CD = j.JBGR_CD LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE_SALARY es ON m.USER_ID = es.USER_ID AND ( (NVL(ei.EMPL_STAT_CD, '01') != '03' AND es.USE_YN = 'Y') OR (ei.EMPL_STAT_CD = '03' AND es.APPLY_YMD = ( SELECT MAX(APPLY_YMD) FROM EMPLOYEE_SALARY WHERE USER_ID = m.USER_ID )) ) WHERE m.USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT m.USER_ID AS M_USER_ID, m.USER_ENPSWD AS M_USER_ENPSWD, m.USER_NAME AS M_USER_NAME, m.USER_ENRRNO AS M_USER_ENRRNO, m.USER_GNDR_CD AS M_USER_GNDR_CD, m.USER_BRDT AS M_USER_BRDT, m.JOIN_DT AS M_JOIN_DT, m.USER_TELNO AS M_USER_TELNO, m.USER_EMAIL_ADDR AS M_USER_EMAIL_ADDR, m.USER_ZIP AS M_USER_ZIP, m.USER_ADDR AS M_USER_ADDR, m.USER_DADDR AS M_USER_DADDR, m.USER_PROFILE AS M_USER_PROFILE, m.REG_DATE AS M_REG_DATE, m.MOD_DATE AS M_MOD_DATE, m.ENABLE AS M_ENABLE, m.USER_ROLE AS M_USER_ROLE, ei.DEPT_CD, ei.EMPL_STAT_CD, ei.EMPL_TYPE_CD, ei.USER_ID AS EI_USER_ID, ei.DEPT_CD AS EI_DEPT_CD, ei.JBGR_CD AS EI_JBGR_CD, ei.JOIN_YMD AS EI_JOIN_YMD, ei.RETMT_YMD AS EI_RETMT_YMD, ei.EMPL_STAT_CD AS EI_EMPL_STAT_CD, ei.ATCH_FILE_ID AS EI_ATCH_FILE_ID, ei.CHRG_DUTY_CN AS EI_CHRG_DUTY_CN, ei.EMPL_TYPE_CD AS EI_EMPL_TYPE_CD, ei.CTRCT_END_YMD AS EI_CTRCT_END_YMD, d.DEPT_NM, j.JBGR_NM, es.BASE_SALARY FROM MEMBER m LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE_INFO ei ON m.USER_ID = ei.USER_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON ei.DEPT_CD = d.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN JOB_GRADE j ON ei.JBGR_CD = j.JBGR_CD LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE_SALARY es ON m.USER_ID = es.USER_ID AND es.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE m.USER_ROLE = 'ROLE_ADMIN' AND m.ENABLE = 'Y' ORDER BY m.USER_ID

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "total", SUM(CASE WHEN ei.EMPL_STAT_CD = '01' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "active", SUM(CASE WHEN ei.EMPL_STAT_CD = '02' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "onLeave", SUM(CASE WHEN ei.EMPL_STAT_CD = '03' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "resigned" FROM MEMBER m LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE_INFO ei ON m.USER_ID = ei.USER_ID WHERE m.USER_ROLE = 'ROLE_ADMIN'
SELECT DISTINCT TO_CHAR(JOIN_YMD, 'YYYY') AS JOIN_YEAR FROM EMPLOYEE_INFO WHERE JOIN_YMD IS NOT NULL ORDER BY JOIN_YEAR
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT MAX(USER_ID) FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_ID LIKE CONCAT(#{baseId}, '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET USER_NAME = #{userName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USER_GNDR_CD = #{userGndrCd, jdbcType=CHAR}, USER_BRDT = #{userBrdt, jdbcType=DATE}, USER_TELNO = #{userTelno, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USER_EMAIL_ADDR = #{userEmailAddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USER_ZIP = #{userZip, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USER_ADDR = #{userAddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USER_DADDR = #{userDaddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USER_PROFILE = #{userProfile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MOD_DATE = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE USER_ID = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

UPDATE MEMBER SET USER_NAME = #{userName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USER_TELNO = #{userTelno, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USER_EMAIL_ADDR = #{userEmailAddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USER_ZIP = #{userZip, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USER_ADDR = #{userAddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USER_DADDR = #{userDaddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USER_PROFILE = #{userProfile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USER_ROLE = #{userRole, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ENABLE = #{enable, jdbcType=CHAR}, MOD_DATE = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE USER_ID = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

UPDATE EMPLOYEE_INFO SET DEPT_CD = #{deptCd, jdbcType=CHAR}, JBGR_CD = #{jbgrCd, jdbcType=CHAR}, JOIN_YMD = #{joinYmd, jdbcType=DATE}, EMPL_STAT_CD = #{emplStatCd, jdbcType=CHAR}, EMPL_TYPE_CD = #{emplTypeCd, jdbcType=CHAR}, CTRCT_END_YMD = TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{ctrctEndYmd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, 10), 'YYYY-MM-DD') NULL , CHRG_DUTY_CN = #{chrgDutyCn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MDFR_ID = #{lastMdfrId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MDFCN_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE USER_ID = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT BASE_SALARY FROM EMPLOYEE_SALARY WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE EMPLOYEE_SALARY SET USE_YN = 'N', MDFCN_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE USER_ID = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
UPDATE MEMBER SET ENABLE = 'N', MOD_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND ENABLE = 'Y'

UPDATE EMPLOYEE_INFO SET EMPL_STAT_CD = '03', RETMT_YMD = SYSTIMESTAMP, RETMT_RSN = #{retmtRsn}, LAST_MDFR_ID = #{loginUserId}, MDFCN_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND NVL(EMPL_STAT_CD, '00') != '03'
UPDATE EMPLOYEE_SALARY SET USE_YN = 'N', LAST_MDFR_ID = #{loginUserId}, MDFCN_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID , USER_ENPSWD , USER_NAME , USER_ENRRNO , USER_GNDR_CD , USER_BRDT , JOIN_DT , USER_TELNO , USER_EMAIL_ADDR , USER_ZIP , USER_ADDR , USER_DADDR , USER_PROFILE , REG_DATE , MOD_DATE , ENABLE , USER_ROLE FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_ROLE IN ('ROLE_USER', 'ROLE_STUDENT')

SELECT USER_ID , USER_ENPSWD , USER_NAME , USER_ENRRNO , USER_GNDR_CD , USER_BRDT , JOIN_DT , USER_TELNO , USER_EMAIL_ADDR , USER_ZIP , USER_ADDR , USER_DADDR , USER_PROFILE , REG_DATE , MOD_DATE , ENABLE , USER_ROLE FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND USER_ROLE IN ('ROLE_USER', 'ROLE_STUDENT')
SELECT DISTINCT TO_CHAR(JOIN_DT, 'YYYY') AS JOIN_YEAR FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_ROLE IN ('ROLE_USER', 'ROLE_STUDENT') AND JOIN_DT IS NOT NULL ORDER BY JOIN_YEAR
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER_CREATE_LOG ( USER_ID , RGTR_ID , LAST_MDFR_ID , REG_DT , MDFCN_DT ) VALUES(#{userId}, #{rgtrId}, #{lastMdfrId}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP)
INSERT INTO MEMBER_WITHDRAW_LOG ( USER_ID , WITHDRAW_RSN , RGTR_ID , LAST_MDFR_ID , REG_DT , MDFCN_DT ) VALUES(#{userId}, #{withdrawRsn}, #{rgtrId}, #{lastMdfrId}, SYSTIMESTAMP , SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "total", SUM(CASE WHEN m.USER_ROLE = 'ROLE_USER' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "roleUser", SUM(CASE WHEN m.USER_ROLE = 'ROLE_STUDENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "roleStudent", SUM(CASE WHEN m.USER_ROLE = 'ROLE_STUDENT' AND cm_d.USER_ID IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "unregistered" FROM MEMBER m LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT USER_ID FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER) cm_d ON m.USER_ID = cm_d.USER_ID WHERE m.USER_ROLE IN ('ROLE_USER', 'ROLE_STUDENT')

SELECT m.USER_ID AS M_USER_ID, m.USER_ENPSWD AS M_USER_ENPSWD, m.USER_NAME AS M_USER_NAME, m.USER_ENRRNO AS M_USER_ENRRNO, m.USER_GNDR_CD AS M_USER_GNDR_CD, m.USER_BRDT AS M_USER_BRDT, m.JOIN_DT AS M_JOIN_DT, m.USER_TELNO AS M_USER_TELNO, m.USER_EMAIL_ADDR AS M_USER_EMAIL_ADDR, m.USER_ZIP AS M_USER_ZIP, m.USER_ADDR AS M_USER_ADDR, m.USER_DADDR AS M_USER_DADDR, m.USER_PROFILE AS M_USER_PROFILE, m.REG_DATE AS M_REG_DATE, m.MOD_DATE AS M_MOD_DATE, m.ENABLE AS M_ENABLE, m.USER_ROLE AS M_USER_ROLE, ei.DEPT_CD, ei.EMPL_STAT_CD, ei.EMPL_TYPE_CD, ei.USER_ID AS EI_USER_ID, ei.DEPT_CD AS EI_DEPT_CD, ei.JBGR_CD AS EI_JBGR_CD, ei.JOIN_YMD AS EI_JOIN_YMD, ei.RETMT_YMD AS EI_RETMT_YMD, ei.EMPL_STAT_CD AS EI_EMPL_STAT_CD, ei.ATCH_FILE_ID AS EI_ATCH_FILE_ID, ei.CHRG_DUTY_CN AS EI_CHRG_DUTY_CN, ei.EMPL_TYPE_CD AS EI_EMPL_TYPE_CD, ei.CTRCT_END_YMD AS EI_CTRCT_END_YMD, d.DEPT_NM, j.JBGR_NM, es.BASE_SALARY FROM MEMBER m LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE_INFO ei ON m.USER_ID = ei.USER_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON ei.DEPT_CD = d.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN JOB_GRADE j ON ei.JBGR_CD = j.JBGR_CD LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE_SALARY es ON m.USER_ID = es.USER_ID AND es.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE m.USER_ROLE = 'ROLE_ADMIN' AND m.ENABLE = 'Y'
AND m.USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{detailCondition.keyword} || '%'
AND ei.DEPT_CD = #{detailCondition.deptCd}
AND TRIM(j.JBGR_NM) = #{detailCondition.jbgrNm}
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ADMINLOGIN_LOG l WHERE l.USER_ID = m.USER_ID AND l.LOGOUT_DT IS NULL)
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ADMINLOGIN_LOG l WHERE l.USER_ID = m.USER_ID AND l.LOGOUT_DT IS NULL)
ORDER BY
m.USER_NAME d.DEPT_NM j.JBGR_NM m.USER_ID
DESC ASC
NULLS LAST OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{screenSize} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DEPARTMENT (DEPT_CD, PRNT_DEPT_CD, DEPT_NM, USE_YN, INTL_TEL_NO, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT) VALUES (#{deptCd}, #{prntDeptCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptNm}, 'Y', #{intlTelNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rgtrId}, #{rgtrId}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE DEPARTMENT SET DEPT_NM = #{deptNm}, PRNT_DEPT_CD = #{prntDeptCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INTL_TEL_NO = #{intlTelNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MDFR_ID = #{lastMdfrId}, MDFCN_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE DEPT_CD = #{deptCd}
UPDATE DEPARTMENT SET USE_YN = #{useYn}, LAST_MDFR_ID = #{loginUserId}, MDFCN_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE DEPT_CD = #{deptCd}
mapper.select: SELECT JBGR_CD, JBGR_NM, SORT_ORD, USE_YN, BASE_ANN_LV_DAYS, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT, DEPT_CD FROM JOB_GRADE ORDER BY SORT_ORD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO JOB_GRADE (JBGR_CD, JBGR_NM, SORT_ORD, USE_YN, BASE_ANN_LV_DAYS, DEPT_CD, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT) VALUES (#{jbgrCd}, #{jbgrNm}, #{sortOrd, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 'Y', NVL(#{baseAnnLvDays, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 15), #{deptCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rgtrId}, #{rgtrId}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE JOB_GRADE SET JBGR_NM = #{jbgrNm}, SORT_ORD = #{sortOrd, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, BASE_ANN_LV_DAYS = #{baseAnnLvDays, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, DEPT_CD = #{deptCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MDFR_ID = #{lastMdfrId}, MDFCN_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE JBGR_CD = #{jbgrCd}
UPDATE JOB_GRADE SET USE_YN = #{useYn}, LAST_MDFR_ID = #{loginUserId}, MDFCN_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE JBGR_CD = #{jbgrCd}
UPDATE EMPLOYEE_INFO SET MNT_USER_ID = #{mntUserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MDFR_ID = #{loginUserId}, MDFCN_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.select: select * from member where user_id = #{userId} and user_role in ('ROLE_USER', 'ROLE_STUDENT')

SELECT m.USER_ID AS userId, m.USER_NAME AS userName, d.DEPT_NM AS deptNm, j.JBGR_NM AS jbgrNm, NVL(j.BASE_ANN_LV_DAYS, 0) AS totalDays, NVL(u.USED_DAYS, 0) AS usedDays, NVL(j.BASE_ANN_LV_DAYS, 0) - NVL(u.USED_DAYS, 0) AS remainDays FROM MEMBER m JOIN EMPLOYEE_INFO ei ON m.USER_ID = ei.USER_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON ei.DEPT_CD = d.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN JOB_GRADE j ON ei.JBGR_CD = j.JBGR_CD LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ANN_USER_ID, SUM(ANN_REQ_DAYS) AS USED_DAYS FROM ANNUAL_LEAVE_HISTORY WHERE SUBSTR(ANN_STRT_YMD, 1, 4) = NVL(#{detailCondition.year}NULL, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY')) GROUP BY ANN_USER_ID ) u ON u.ANN_USER_ID = m.USER_ID WHERE m.USER_ROLE = 'ROLE_ADMIN' AND NVL(ei.EMPL_STAT_CD, '01') != '03'
AND ei.DEPT_CD = #{detailCondition.deptCd}
AND m.USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{detailCondition.keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY
m.USER_NAME d.DEPT_NM usedDays remainDays m.USER_NAME
DESC ASC
NULLS LAST OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{screenSize} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ANNUAL_LEAVE_HISTORY ( ANN_USER_ID, ANN_TYPE_CD, ANN_STRT_YMD, ANN_END_YMD, ANN_REQ_DAYS, ANN_RSN_CN, APRVL_DOC_SN, RGTR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT ) VALUES ( #{annUserId}, #{annTypeCd}, #{annStrtYmd}, #{annEndYmd}, #{annReqDays}, #{annRsnCn}, #{aprvlDocSn}, #{annUserId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ANNUAL_LEAVE_HISTORY WHERE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN ANN_STRT_YMD AND ANN_END_YMD) AS TODAY_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ANNUAL_LEAVE_HISTORY WHERE SUBSTR(ANN_STRT_YMD, 1, 6) = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM')) AS MONTH_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ANNUAL_LEAVE_HISTORY WHERE SUBSTR(ANN_STRT_YMD, 1, 4) = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY')) AS YEAR_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ANNUAL_LEAVE_HISTORY WHERE ANN_STRT_YMD > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS UPCOMING_CNT FROM DUAL
